atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left hand pain and numbness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the left hand, primarily at night, for several months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness in his fingers, particularly the little finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports weakness in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports dropping things occasionally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a history of rheumatoid arthritis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports drinking a beer or two on Fridays and Saturdays.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes repetitive type movements.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tingling in his fingers.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals decreased sensation in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient demonstrates weakness with grip strength testing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms and examination findings are most consistent with peripheral neuropathy, likely secondary to repetitive strain injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor prescribes a nurse to assess the patient's current medications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor plans to discharge the patient.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor will see the patient in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders nerve conduction studies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor initiates physical therapy for repetitive strain injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor advises patient on ergonomic adjustments to reduce repetitive movements.
